changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: UPDATE static_ua SET pattern = 'Inoreader', sort_order = 48 WHERE ua_name = 'Inoreader'

INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label, pattern, sort_order) VALUES ('KrISS feed', 'Feed Readers', 'KrISS feed', 'KrISS feed', 49), ('newsboat', 'Feed Readers', 'newsboat', 'newsboat/', 50), ('RSS Guard', 'Feed Readers', 'RSS Guard', 'rssguard', 51), ('Gofeed', 'Feed Readers', 'Gofeed', 'Gofeed/', 52)
UPDATE cloudfront_logs SET ua_name = 'Inoreader' WHERE ua_name = 'Unknown' AND user_agent LIKE '%Inoreader%'
UPDATE cloudfront_logs SET ua_name = 'Inoreader' WHERE ua_name = 'Unknown' AND user_agent LIKE '%inoreader.com%'
UPDATE cloudfront_logs SET ua_name = 'KrISS feed' WHERE ua_name = 'Unknown' AND user_agent LIKE '%KrISS feed%'
UPDATE cloudfront_logs SET ua_name = 'newsboat' WHERE ua_name = 'Unknown' AND user_agent LIKE '%newsboat/%'
UPDATE cloudfront_logs SET ua_name = 'RSS Guard' WHERE ua_name = 'Unknown' AND user_agent LIKE '%rssguard%'
UPDATE cloudfront_logs SET ua_name = 'Gofeed' WHERE ua_name = 'Unknown' AND user_agent LIKE '%Gofeed/%'
